# Energidepartementet

*18 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Ikrafttredelse | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| [Lov i henhold til konvensjonen mellem Norge og Sverige om visse spørsmål vedrøre](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1931-06-12-1.md) | Vassdragslov i h.t. konvensjon Norge/Sverige | 1932-01-05 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1931-06-12-1.md) |
| [Lov om Norgespris og strømstønad til husholdninger](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-44.md) | Lov om Norgespris og strømstønad til husholdninger | 2025-08-29, 2025-09-15 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-44.md) |
| [Lov om elsertifikater](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2011-06-24-39.md) | Elsertifikatloven | 2012-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2011-06-24-39.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i arbeidsmiljøloven (lovens anvendelse for fornybar energiprodu](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-45.md) | Endringslov til arbeidsmiljøloven | 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-45.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i energiloven (tidlig saksavslutning mv.)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-46.md) | Endringslov til energiloven | 2025-07-01, 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-46.md) |
| [Lov om felles regler for det indre marked for naturgass (naturgassloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2002-06-28-61.md) | Naturgassloven | 2002-08-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2002-06-28-61.md) |
| [Lov om fornybar energiproduksjon til havs (havenergilova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2010-06-04-21.md) | Havenergilova – havenl | 2010-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2010-06-04-21.md) |
| [Lov om garantistillelse fra Statoil ASA ved emisjon og salg av statens aksjer](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2001-05-18-22.md) | Lov om garanti fra Statoil ASA ved aksjesalg | 2001-05-18 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2001-05-18-22.md) |
| [Lov om konsesjon for rettigheter til vannfall mv. (vannfallrettighetsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1917-12-14-16.md) | Vannfallrettighetsloven | 1917-12-14 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1917-12-14-16.md) |
| [Lov om mineralvirksomhet på kontinentalsokkelen (havbunnsmineralloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-03-22-7.md) | Havbunnsmineralloven | 2019-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2019-03-22-7.md) |
| [Lov om petroleumsvirksomhet [petroleumsloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1996-11-29-72.md) | Petroleumsloven – petrl | 1997-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1996-11-29-72.md) |
| [Lov om produksjon, omforming, overføring, omsetning, fordeling og bruk av energi](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1990-06-29-50.md) | Energiloven – enl | 1991-01-01, 1990-06-29 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1990-06-29-50.md) |
| [Lov om registrering av import og leveranser av råolje i Det europeiske økonomisk](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-06-25-54.md) | Lov om registrering av råoljehandel – råolregl | 1999-06-25, 1999-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-06-25-54.md) |
| [Lov om regulering og kraftutbygging i vassdrag (vassdragsreguleringsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1917-12-14-17.md) | Vassdragsreguleringsloven – vregl | 1917-12-14 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1917-12-14-17.md) |
| [Lov om sikring mot naturskader](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1994-03-25-7.md) | Naturskadeloven | 1995-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1994-03-25-7.md) |
| [Lov om undersøkelser etter og utvinning av petroleum i grunnen under norsk lando](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1973-05-04-21.md) | Lov om utvinning av petroleum under land | 1973-05-04 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1973-05-04-21.md) |
| [Lov om vassdrag og grunnvann (vannressursloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2000-11-24-82.md) | Vannressursloven – vrl | 2001-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2000-11-24-82.md) |
| [Lov om vassdragene [vassdragsloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1940-03-15-3.md) | Vassdragsloven – vdrl |  | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1940-03-15-3.md) |
